key_events: Jung Hee-Won and Lee Gil-Yung attempt to attack the Cinema Master-controlled Yu Joong-Hyuk with 'Judgment Time!' and 'Mjolnir's Thunder!' respectively, but their attacks are neutralized by Yu Joong-Hyuk's 'Electricity Immunity'.

Kim Dok-Ja uses 'Character Sheet' on Yu Joong-Hyuk, revealing his detailed profile, including his 'Regressor (3rd Time)' attribute, 'Transmission Lv.3' mark, and various skills, notably 'Mental Barrier Lv.5'.
Dok-Ja consumes an 'Enraged T-Rex DNA Ampoule', significantly boosting his Stamina (Lv.24 to Lv.34), Strength (Lv.24 to Lv.34), Agility (Lv.20 to Lv.30), and Mana (Lv.15 to Lv.25) for 30 minutes.
Dok-Ja activates 'White Star Weapon Aura' (which levels up) and confronts Yu Joong-Hyuk, who counters with 'Blue Star Weapon Aura Lv.2'.
Dok-Ja struggles to keep up with Yu Joong-Hyuk despite his enhanced attributes and activates 'Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint Lv.2'.

Dok-Ja has an internal monologue about the consequences of Yu Joong-Hyuk's regressions and the Cinema Master's control, attributing it to Yu Joong-Hyuk's unstable mind and insufficient 'Mental Barrier'.
The Cinema Master taunts Dok-Ja and Yu Joong-Hyuk, questioning Yu Joong-Hyuk's status as a protagonist in his 'third regression'.
Dok-Ja declares his purpose: 'I am the only living thing left in this world. As the reader of all 3146 chapters of Ways of Survival, I will live for the protagonist.'
Dok-Ja experiences physical symptoms (burning skin, tearing eyes) as his 'Fourth Wall' skill resonates, leading him to feel 'completely alone'.
Jung Hee-Won (or a narrative voice) confronts Dok-Ja's feeling of loneliness, recounting Yu Joong-Hyuk's past sufferings and regressions, emphasizing that he was never truly alone.
summary.character_updates: Kim Dok-Ja consumes an 'Enraged T-Rex DNA Ampoule', significantly boosting his Stamina, Strength, Agility, and Mana for 30 minutes. He activates 'White Star Weapon Aura' (which levels up) and 'Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint Lv.2'. He experiences physical symptoms from his 'Fourth Wall' resonating and declares his resolve to live for Yu Joong-Hyuk. Yu Joong-Hyuk's detailed character profile is revealed, confirming his 'Regressor (3rd Time)' status and various high-level skills, including 'Mental Barrier Lv.5' and 'Transmission Lv.3'. He is currently unconscious but controlled by the Cinema Master, using 'Blue Star Weapon Aura Lv.2' in combat, and shows signs of internal struggle against the control. Jung Hee-Won attempts to attack Yu Joong-Hyuk with 'Judgment Time!' and delivers a powerful monologue challenging Dok-Ja's (and implicitly Yu Joong-Hyuk's) sense of isolation. Lee Gil-Yung attempts to attack Yu Joong-Hyuk with 'Mjolnir's Thunder!'.
summary.lore_and_worldbuilding: The chapter confirms Yu Joong-Hyuk's 'Regressor (3rd Time)' attribute and the function of his 'Transmission Lv.3' mark, which reactivates skills from previous regressions. The Cinema Master's control over Yu Joong-Hyuk is attributed to Yu Joong-Hyuk's 'unstable mind' and his 'Mental Barrier Lv.5' being insufficient (Dok-Ja notes it would need to be Lv.8). The 'Fourth Wall' unique skill is shown to resonate, causing physical symptoms in Dok-Ja when he feels isolated. The chapter title defines 'Sunfish' as a fragile, easily dying fish, used as a meme, which Dok-Ja uses as a taunt against Yu Joong-Hyuk.
summary.ending_cliffhanger: Yu Joong-Hyuk, still under the Cinema Master's control, shows signs of internal awareness and struggle, exclaiming 'I'M CONTROLLED NOW! CINEMA!' as the intense battle with Dok-Ja continues, leaving his fate and the immediate outcome of the confrontation uncertain.
